text.title: Task Creation and Parallelization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Task Creation and Parallelization end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: extract-tasks
step.action: Walk impl-plan rows, emit one task per row.

step.name: size-tasks
step.action: Estimate tokens per task; split if >30k.

step.name: dependencies
step.action: List depends_on for each task; reject implicit shared writes.

step.name: wave-grouping
step.action: Group into wave 0 (no deps), wave 1 (deps in 0), and so on.
